textByHashes.e9ac534b2c4fe5babf2fc8f65c45ff5b0382445c: Yeah, I do, as a matter of fact!
textByHashes.7900ada279f18193a608719e6b15d3c56f7a62f8: I am a poor, dispossessed nobleman, forced by circumstance to lurk in the middle of nowhere, soliciting help from passers-by.
textByHashes.8233d9ce605040261f16b6db6b472929188cda17: You see, my fiendish half-brother has seized my estates and forced me into exile.
textByHashes.65f3d728eaa4f7dfb504f126c51f81601a53e4c6: The simple lemon farmers suffer under his tyrannous yoke, and only a brave adventurer can lift his iron boot from the neck of the poor.
textByHashes.cce32e5b3f959adbb4f7bef237c99807525dd577: To reclaim my lands I will need to have my family sword returned to me so that I may present it as proof of my rulership.
textByHashes.d4463fd85607a814ab462f68c71618d8926b0caf: Will you help me find my family sword?
textByHashes.3d0c336782a41df5958141b57992131d40344ab8: But, alas, my half brother has a powerful ally, the mighty demon...
textByHashes.ef7e6dd4b6c87aa7572dba4484f88aad22c8d0af: Barrelor is an awesome opponent, and to reclaim my family sword you will need to defeat him, for he guards it within the deadly Trapped Pit of Barrelor.
textByHashes.9a576f1610e06b17cc3a4dcfbe0d14111c982c9e: When I am reinstated in my rightful place, I will not be a very wealthy man, as my half-brother has squandered my family fortune.
textByHashes.42213ff40dfaab035a99529dedd55f5340ba7aa5: However, I will gladly give you every bent penny of what is left, and starve in the gutter with my many, many adorable children, if you say you will help me.
textByHashes.9d3d00fe29e7aa12ba00bbf4ac0505d9162c1301: Wonderful! Just pick up your diversion and we'll leave!
textByHashes.a7dd12644c4a79c0933d6add3cb1ce89d7d3142b: Look, I think I'll wait here for someone a little more... you know...
textByHashes.fc0cd6137a8e30986616b0c30bfe3b982a7a6049: Oh! Yes! The demon, with the oppression and stuff!
textByHashes.189c8338ac39a3b569246f564cec419eafea5946: However, I will gladly give you every bent penny of what is left, and starve in the gutter with my many adorable children if you say you will help me.
textByHashes.7395f8193151ba334210559f2307e10414d98ab2: I found us a hero down by the docks!
textByHashes.bc93fc68e03b47d0f054be9bb4bf3c6f9910b33d: Aye! They also be gullible, tied up and unconscious!
textByHashes.0328458862f2a37fd31c7827a53de7f1e413fe97: They were willing to help out some random stranger with a good enough sob story, so I smacked them with a bottle and rowed them over.
textByHashes.86abcbe7b59b4c4e948ac076419a764e2b5e65ba: I may have a quest, but you don't look like you'd be able to handle the kind of monsters I have problems with.
textByHashes.0c348cfe4c66bd93c1e3d33945629d5dd9cbe437: Yes, the mighty, fearsome, tall, deadly, oaken, round demon Barrelor the Destroyer.
textByHashes.01878bbabebe0c0f9116375b9e4fb9abd5f8c7cf: So, what brings you down here today?
textByHashes.fdea971c914a6f8d9424faf9dbff698265da984d: Yes, you owe me some money.
textByHashes.9095d9f2d1c71f1898e95456f5cbe8c662f2f42d: Want a lift to Braindeath Island?
textByHashes.d1562a6c1e2303764b93d5347ccebc3a418c92b5: Nope. It's Braindeath island or nothing. Interested?
textByHashes.4a5b53aef5ff4cb933570a4ce5e8224849ac2cf5: Want a lift to Port Phasmatys?
textByHashes.a8a5f2a0681d9a2109f5d4c205b5aa66abfaa260: All right. I'll need to use my Magical Teleporting Bottle.
textByHashes.cdbe47c8a443ade2538ddc20407c2a89d5f0e974: Yes. Just turn around three times, then clap your hands and say the place you want to go.
textByHashes.be3a773dc94a1b3c82e45cc4d21aa5ef65ab3aa4: Would you like a hand with your stuff? You seemed to have dropped something.
textByHashes.9b64560f148be4e6b3502ba3a42b05521751be01: All right. You know that it's going to cost extra to take your friend as well, right?
textByHashes.498a5bace565982dd8a9e6615e201f4f219c8718: Certainly. By the way, you have a spider in your hair.
textByHashes.bb908f2bc02f3a5d2aefa196a4f8d842d5cd50b0: Sure, turn around and I'll get it for you.
textByHashes.47036a2e0e18524194a217a21db66eb248185f62: Well I'll be more than happy to...
textByHashes.0527c253d390be9e21ff675c383623a7fe6e0821: ...missed your mouth while drinking from a bottle. Hence the bottle-shaped bruises.
textByHashes.d5406c60cbaca3f1827bfe9c7184ead2e1111c72: ...slipped and slid into a brick wall.
textByHashes.5343cd0f4ca36a96eb75287b84efba0a2453538a: ...managed to fall onto my boot while I was practicing kicking.
textByHashes.ddfe822df96053991e84261a36abdf1403ec22f4: ...hit your head on my oars while I was rowing over.
textByHashes.6da9fcc3091c66355f646fa2480521adc631b625: Well, it's possibly the weight of all of your expensive items giving you a sore back.
textByHashes.11db1b424918b944f301473ca9f202a526be07ee: As a doctor I can tell you that sometimes a bad back can manifest as a headache.
textByHashes.b0b49cedf4faaf2c85ea564b41f462c448ad527a: Regardless, I can tell you that if you hand me your most expensive items, then the pain will disappear.
textByHashes.dd214242ba0b2665d65e9fa93c971f87f998bc15: Yes I am, he's my cousin.
textByHashes.b0a53633fede8ba39efcad277e9fefff42a8387a: Well, I arranged with all my friends to have a party at his place.
textByHashes.733158ccff61acf6c4dad6f5274bf29545baf373: But then I humiliated myself by trying to dance with the knights.
textByHashes.3fb5025963e661168e48290abb749206934f4dff: All of them collapsed on me in a horrific, jangling pile.
textByHashes.28b90c1ca2e6628b16b30c3ff10dac0f11249ec1: I tried to salvage the night by having all the balloons come down...
textByHashes.31dd1e3cd71ec7b1d8500301c9e8b94f89e34cf4: I didn't know that someone had swapped the balloons with cannonballs!
textByHashes.45aadc2cbf973a85d02c5723fe34245e1bcaffcf: That was the worst fifth birthday party in the history of the world.
textByHashes.84d6bee878a5d4de9eba05e9dd372ff3e92ecb06: Not according to the Official History of Gielinor!
textByHashes.75d0a8e426a8aae910e95e221225dedf7f996b25: Every edition... the pictures bring it all back...
textByHashes.226216ca5b12764e79d4a1d7dc56a99eeb120192: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
textByHashes.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
textByHashes.2a6aeccb6839bdca76cab0dc7a882231ec5ccee3: 'Tis all quiet on the eastern front.
textByHashes.6c03be866285312971a534fe662cc74704032879: Holler like a bosun without a bottle.
